top_candidates.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.
Unofficial Python API for Google NotebookLM
The agent that grows with you
The best ChatGPT that $100 can buy.

A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

waiting_for_human.question: treeverse/dvc 被识别为原生 CLI/SDK 项目，不是提供 HTTP 入口的 LazyCat Web 微服。是否要将该候选标记为跳过，而不是继续保留当前的 Web 微服迁移初稿？

The Calcite build failure is fixed and a local LPK was generated, but install/reinstall acceptance cannot run because this worker shell does not have LZC_CLI_TOKEN. Should the worker be rerun with LazyCat install credentials, or should acceptance be deferred?

XboxDownload is a native .NET/Avalonia desktop/network utility rather than a web service. Should this queue item be excluded, or should migration attempt a custom noVNC desktop wrapper despite the extra product and networking risk?
Camoufox appears to be a browser build/automation SDK rather than a self-contained HTTP web app for LazyCat. How should this queue item proceed?
Should wild-linker/wild be skipped as a non-web CLI tool, or should there be a special developer-tool packaging direction for it?
CMake does not expose a self-hosted web service. Should this queue item be skipped as non-deployable, or should humans define a special product scope such as a web terminal/toolbox package?
NixOS/nixpkgs appears to be the Nix package collection and NixOS source tree, not a standalone HTTP web service. How should this candidate be handled?
rocksdanister/lively is a Windows WinUI desktop wallpaper/screensaver app, not a web service. How should this queue item be handled?
